backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining user profiles, wellness reports with section scores (sleep/hydration/exercise/diet), medical history, solution tips, and CRUD operations with access control and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented admin dashboard features including user assessment data table, search, filters, sorting, pagination, and export functionality with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and utilities including navigation, assessment flow, admin dashboard, and styling configurations.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet with Tailwind directives, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, and design tokens for shadcn/ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with meta tags for ABL Pulse holistic wellness assessment and root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, assessment sections, results, admin dashboard, and logic docs, wrapped in AssessmentProvider for global state.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying Root Cause Healing philosophy, four core value cards with icons and hover effects, and integrated founder profile.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Displays a bilingual access denied message with a shield icon and a button to navigate back to the home page for unauthorized admin access attempts.
frontend/src/components/admin/Assessment: Provides filtering UI for assessments with search by name, date range pickers, score range inputs, and a clear filters button showing active filter count.
frontend/src/components/admin/QuickStats: Displays four stat cards showing total assessments, average score, alert users, and recent submissions calculated from admin assessment data with loading skeleton states.
frontend/src/components/admin/StatCard.t: A reusable card component displaying a statistic with title, value, icon, optional subtitle, and color-coded variants (default/success/warning/danger).
frontend/src/components/admin/TablePagin: Pagination controls for tables with page navigation buttons, page size selector, and display of current range and total items.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserAssess: Admin table component for displaying user assessment data with filtering (search, date range, score range), sorting, pagination, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying problems or suggestions with bilingual titles, conditional styling (red/green backgrounds), and list or paragraph formatting based on card type.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentPlaceh: Empty placeholder component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentProgre: Progress bar component showing current section (1-4), percentage completion, and animated gradient fill bar for assessment progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/BasicInfoForm.ts: Form component for collecting user's basic information (name, age, gender, profession, physical measurements, contact details, and medical history) before starting the health assessment. Validates inputs and saves data to local storage before navigating to the first assessment section.
frontend/src/components/CircularScoreGau: Displays a circular progress gauge with gradient colors (red/amber/green) based on score status. Shows the user's score as a fraction of the maximum score with animated SVG circle progress.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Footer component with brand information, quick links, social media icons, and a WhatsApp consultation button. Includes navigation to admin panel and displays copyright information.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary component that catches JavaScript errors in child components and displays a bilingual (English/Hindi) error UI with options to retry or reload the page.
frontend/src/components/FounderProfile.t: Displays the founder Dr. Suman Lal's profile with image, credentials (40+ years experience), and mission statement in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/components/GlobalAssessment: Reusable component providing bilingual (English/Hindi) frequency options (Never, Rarely, Sometimes, Often, Daily) for assessment questions with visual selection feedback.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Landing page hero section with animated background effects, main headline 'Small Habits. Big Impact.', and call-to-action buttons for starting the health assessment or booking a consultation via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelectio: Empty file placeholder for language selection functionality.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggleBu: Empty file placeholder for language toggle button component.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading component displaying the ABL Pulse logo with pulse animation and a bilingual loading message with animated progress bar.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Main navigation component with logo, menu items (Home, Assessment, About, Contact), language toggle for assessment sections, and responsive mobile/desktop layouts. Handles smooth scrolling and assessment routing.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard.tsx: Empty file placeholder for question card component.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard40.t: Empty file placeholder for a specific question card variant.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for assessment results display component.
frontend/src/components/ResumeProgressMo: Empty file placeholder for modal allowing users to resume incomplete assessments.
frontend/src/components/SectionContainer: Empty file placeholder for assessment section wrapper component.
frontend/src/components/SectionScoreCard: Displays a bilingual (English/Hindi) card showing a health section's score out of 40, status category (alert/needsWork/optimal), icon, and a color-coded progress bar.
frontend/src/components/ServicesGrid.tsx: Renders a grid of four service cards (Health Score Card, Webinars, 1-on-1 Support, Structured Programs) with icons, titles, and descriptions in a responsive layout.
frontend/src/components/TipCard.tsx: An expandable card component displaying bilingual health tips with icon, title, description, and accordion-style "Why This Helps" section; includes a demo instance.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Application-wide constants including WhatsApp consultation number, message template, app metadata, and score thresholds for section and total scores.
React context providing assessment state management including responses for 40 questions, current section, language selection, and section completion/access logic with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Empty file, likely placeholder for language context functionality.
frontend/src/data/assessmentOptions.ts: Empty file, likely placeholder for assessment option definitions.
frontend/src/data/assessmentQuestions.ts: Empty file, likely placeholder for assessment question definitions.
Empty file, likely placeholder for 40-question assessment data.
frontend/src/data/questions/en.ts: English language questions for a 12-question assessment covering sleep, hydration, diet, exercise, stress, and mental well-being across 4 sections.
frontend/src/data/questions/hi.ts: Hindi translations of the 12-question assessment covering sleep, hydration, diet, exercise, stress, and mental well-being across 4 sections.
frontend/src/data/sections/section1.ts: Section 1 questions (IDs 1-10) covering sleep and daily routine habits in both English and Hindi.
frontend/src/data/sections/section2.ts: Section 2 questions (IDs 11-20) covering hydration, digestion, and dietary habits in both English and Hindi.
frontend/src/data/sections/section3.ts: Section 3 questions (IDs 21-30) covering physical activity, exercise, and movement habits in both English and Hindi.
frontend/src/data/sections/section4.ts: Section 4 questions (IDs 31-40) covering mental well-being, gratitude, family relationships, and emotional health in both English and Hindi.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook for managing backend actor instances with Internet Identity authentication, automatic re-initialization on identity changes, and admin token support.
frontend/src/hooks/useAssessmentProgress: Empty file, likely placeholder for assessment progress tracking hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useBasicInfoStorage.t: Custom hook for managing user basic information (name, age, gender, profession, weight, height, WhatsApp number) in localStorage with save, retrieve, clear, and validation functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebounce.ts: Custom React hook that debounces a value by a specified delay using setTimeout and useEffect.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient integration with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/usePagination.ts: Generic pagination hook that manages page state, calculates paginated data slices, and provides navigation functions with automatic page reset on data changes.
frontend/src/hooks/usePDFDownload.ts: Custom hook that manages PDF generation state and downloads wellness reports using the pdfGenerator utility with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating wellness reports, admin assessments, and user data from the ICP backend actor with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTableSort.ts: Generic table sorting hook that manages sort column and direction state with a comparator function for sorting data arrays.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Tailwind CSS, custom OKLCH color variables for brand theming, font imports (Playfair Display, Montserrat), and electric wave/pulse animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying wellness assessment statistics and user data table with authentication checks and navigation.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for admin login page component.
frontend/src/pages/AssessmentPage.tsx: Assessment page that displays the BasicInfoForm component with logo and back navigation to home.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page composing Navigation, HeroSection, ServicesGrid, AboutSection, and ContactFooter components.
frontend/src/pages/LogicCorrectionDocsPa: Documentation page that displays a template format for submitting logic corrections and feature updates, with bilingual (English/Hindi) instructions and structured sections for clear communication with the development team.
frontend/src/pages/RecommendedServicesPa: Displays recommended wellness services (webinars, coaching, functional readiness program) based on user assessment scores, showing user info card with total score and status, and action buttons for each service.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Shows comprehensive assessment results with circular score gauge, section breakdowns, analysis cards, and action buttons for PDF download and WhatsApp consultation booking.
frontend/src/pages/Section1.tsx: Assessment page for Section 1 (Sleep & Hydration) displaying questions with bilingual titles, progress bar, and navigation between assessment intro and Section 2.
frontend/src/pages/Section2.tsx: Assessment page for Section 2 (Gut Cleanse & Metabolic) with access guards to ensure Section 1 is complete, displaying questions and navigation between Sections 1 and 3.
frontend/src/pages/Section3.tsx: Assessment page for Section 3 (Movement & Circulation Flow) with access guards requiring previous sections completion, displaying questions and navigation between Sections 2 and 4.
frontend/src/pages/Section4.tsx: Renders the fourth section of the wellness assessment with navigation guards, progress tracking, and a loading overlay that appears when submitting all responses before navigating to results.
frontend/src/pages/TestModePage.tsx: Displays three test profiles (healthy, moderate, serious) with their scores and analysis, loading data from the backend actor and presenting it in tabbed format.
frontend/src/pages/WellnessProfilePage.t: Shows a user's wellness profile with basic info, total ABL score, and section-by-section scores with color-coded status indicators.
frontend/src/types/admin.ts: Defines TypeScript types for admin dashboard data structures including assessment rows, filters, sorting, and pagination state.
frontend/src/types/assessment.ts: Defines core assessment types including language options, basic info form data with medical history, and question/section structures.
Provides utility functions to calculate admin dashboard statistics like total assessments, average scores, alert users, and recent submissions.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Handles CSV export functionality for assessment data, including field escaping, formatting, CSV generation, and browser download triggering.
frontend/src/utils/patternAnalysis.ts: Implements rule-based pattern analysis to identify low-scoring question groups and map them to specific health problems with Ayurvedic habit suggestions in English and Hindi.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a text-based wellness report file with user info, scores, section breakdown, problems, and suggestions, then triggers browser download.
frontend/src/utils/resultsSharingUtils.t: Empty file, likely intended for future results sharing functionality.
frontend/src/utils/scoringUtils.ts: Provides scoring calculation utilities for a 40-question assessment divided into 4 sections (10 questions each, max 40 points per section, 160 total), with functions to categorize scores into alert/needsWork/optimal ranges and return corresponding labels and Tailwind CSS color classes.
frontend/src/utils/testDataProcessor.ts: Converts backend SectionScores into frontend-displayable format by generating realistic question-level responses (0-4 scale) from section totals, running pattern analysis, and adding medical-history-specific recommendations for display in test profiles.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and functions to store, retrieve, and clear parameters across navigation.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappIntegration.t: Opens WhatsApp consultation link with pre-filled message containing user name and ABL score, directing to a default consultation number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space with CSS variables, custom fonts (Playfair Display for headings, Montserrat for body), extended theme utilities, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking Phase 1 implementation of an Admin Dashboard for a health assessment platform, featuring user assessment data table with search/filter/sort/pagination, quick stats cards, CSV export, and planned future phases for analytics and user management.
